pattern: Interleave two sequences by walking a single index up to the shorter length, then tack on whatever tail remains from the longer one.
hints: Picture the two words written one above the other and read down each column, left first.
Walk one index from 0 up to the length of the shorter word, appending one character from each word at every step.
After the shared prefix is consumed, only one word still has characters left; append its entire remaining suffix in one go.

edge_inputs.description: second word longer, its tail is appended
first word longer, its tail is appended
repeated characters must not be deduped

stress.description: two long random lowercase words of differing lengths
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    n1 = rng.randrange(1, size + 1)
    n2 = rng.randrange(1, size + 1)
    w1 = ''.join(rng.choice(string.ascii_lowercase) for _ in range(n1))
    w2 = ''.join(rng.choice(string.ascii_lowercase) for _ in range(n2))
    return [w1, w2]
